title: Better Potions +
body:
Better Potions + is my first ever resource pack that I have made due to me not liking the vanilla potion textures very much.

![Simple Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aee5c644fe4ef56804e4e02ea18accbf68de74c.png)

This pack is fully vanilla due to me changing only the textures already present in the game files. This means no mods are required to use this resource pack
